title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Strong thunderstorms are Expected for S Germany.

---Risk Areas---

MDRT
S Germany

Strong thunderstorms from France are expected.
The main threats are:
- Hail - up to 4cm is possible
- Severe wind gusts - up to 100+km/h is possible

- Tornado - Minor tornado threat

ENHD
S Germany & Far NW Austria

Same threats as MDRT, but exact the exact coverage isnt clear.
